panels.description: Status do modo de trading. A alteracao deve ser feita pela interface local do exporter.
panels.title: ⚙️ Modo Trading

targets.rawSql:
WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    to_timestamp($__unixEpochGroup(timestamp, $__interval)) AS "time",
    COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND dry_run = false
    AND profile = 'conservative'
    AND 'conservative' IN (${profile:sqlstring})
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__unixEpochFrom() AND $__unixEpochTo()
  GROUP BY 1
),
points AS (
  SELECT to_timestamp($__unixEpochFrom()) AS "time", 0::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta, 0 AS sort_key
  UNION ALL SELECT "time", pnl_delta, 1 AS sort_key FROM bucketed
  UNION ALL SELECT to_timestamp($__unixEpochTo()) AS "time", 0::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta, 2 AS sort_key
)
SELECT "time",
  SUM(pnl_delta) OVER (ORDER BY "time", sort_key)::numeric(12,4) AS "Conservative PnL"
FROM points ORDER BY 1, sort_key

WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    to_timestamp($__unixEpochGroup(timestamp, $__interval)) AS "time",
    COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND dry_run = false
    AND profile = 'aggressive'
    AND 'aggressive' IN (${profile:sqlstring})
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__unixEpochFrom() AND $__unixEpochTo()
  GROUP BY 1
),
points AS (
  SELECT to_timestamp($__unixEpochFrom()) AS "time", 0::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta, 0 AS sort_key
  UNION ALL SELECT "time", pnl_delta, 1 AS sort_key FROM bucketed
  UNION ALL SELECT to_timestamp($__unixEpochTo()) AS "time", 0::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta, 2 AS sort_key
)
SELECT "time",
  SUM(pnl_delta) OVER (ORDER BY "time", sort_key)::numeric(12,4) AS "Aggressive PnL"
FROM points ORDER BY 1, sort_key

WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    to_timestamp($__unixEpochGroup(timestamp, $__interval)) AS "time",
    COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND dry_run = false
    AND profile = 'shadow'
    AND 'shadow' IN (${profile:sqlstring})
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__unixEpochFrom() AND $__unixEpochTo()
  GROUP BY 1
),
points AS (
  SELECT to_timestamp($__unixEpochFrom()) AS "time", 0::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta, 0 AS sort_key
  UNION ALL SELECT "time", pnl_delta, 1 AS sort_key FROM bucketed
  UNION ALL SELECT to_timestamp($__unixEpochTo()) AS "time", 0::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_delta, 2 AS sort_key
)
SELECT "time",
  SUM(pnl_delta) OVER (ORDER BY "time", sort_key)::numeric(12,4) AS "Shadow PnL"
FROM points ORDER BY 1, sort_key

panels.description: Distribuição acumulada de decisões BUY/SELL/HOLD no profile selecionado. Não é filtrada pela janela temporal do dashboard.
panels.title: 🎯 Distribuição de Decisões (Total)

targets.rawSql:
WITH api_trades AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(metadata->'fills'->0->>'createdAt', '')::double precision / 1000.0),
      TO_TIMESTAMP(timestamp),
      created_at
    ) AS exchange_time,
    side
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND order_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source', '') IN ('kucoin_live', 'kucoin_sync', 'kucoin_restore')
    AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
),
bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('hour', exchange_time) AS "time",
    CASE
      WHEN side = 'buy' THEN '🟢 Compras'
      WHEN side = 'sell' THEN '🔴 Vendas'
      ELSE side
    END AS metric,
    COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
  FROM api_trades
  WHERE exchange_time BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
series AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('hour', $__timeFrom()::timestamp),
    date_trunc('hour', $__timeTo()::timestamp),
    interval '1 hour'
  ) AS "time"
),
metrics AS (
  SELECT '🟢 Compras' AS metric
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '🔴 Vendas' AS metric
)
SELECT
  s."time",
  m.metric,
  COALESCE(b.value, 0)::double precision AS value
FROM series s
CROSS JOIN metrics m
LEFT JOIN bucketed b ON b."time" = s."time" AND b.metric = m.metric
ORDER BY 1, 2
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM btc.trades WHERE symbol = '$coin' AND dry_run = false AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$' AND to_timestamp(timestamp) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.description: Últimas decisões do agente de trading em tempo real (atualiza a cada 15s)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(to_timestamp("timestamp") AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  COALESCE(profile, 'default') AS profile,
  action,
  confidence,
  price,
  reason,
  executed
FROM btc.decisions
WHERE symbol = '$coin'
AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
AND to_timestamp("timestamp") BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: 📋 Decisões Recentes (Log Rolante)

panels.description: Somente trades confirmados pela API da KuCoin, usando o horario real do fill quando disponivel.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(
    COALESCE(
      TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(metadata->'fills'->0->>'createdAt', '')::double precision / 1000.0),
      TO_TIMESTAMP(timestamp),
      created_at
    ) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo',
    'DD/MM HH24:MI'
  ) AS "Data/Hora",
  COALESCE(profile, 'default') AS "Profile",
  side AS "Side",
  ROUND(price::numeric, 2) AS "Preço",
  ROUND(size::numeric, 6) AS "Qtd BTC",
  ROUND(COALESCE(pnl, 0)::numeric, 4) AS "PnL ($)",
  ROUND(COALESCE(pnl_pct, 0)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL %",
  COALESCE(metadata->>'exit_reason', '') AS "Motivo"
FROM btc.trades
WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND order_id IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source', '') IN ('kucoin_live', 'kucoin_sync', 'kucoin_restore')
  AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
  AND COALESCE(
    TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(metadata->'fills'->0->>'createdAt', '')::double precision / 1000.0),
    TO_TIMESTAMP(timestamp),
    created_at
  ) BETWEEN to_timestamp($__unixEpochFrom()) AND to_timestamp($__unixEpochTo())
ORDER BY COALESCE(
    TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(metadata->'fills'->0->>'createdAt', '')::double precision / 1000.0),
    TO_TIMESTAMP(timestamp),
    created_at
  ) DESC
LIMIT 100

Painel publico em modo somente leitura.
A troca entre REAL e DRY RUN fica disponivel apenas na interface local do exporter.

panels.description: USDT disponível: para perfil live = saldo real na exchange; para perfil dry/shadow = capital_inicial + pnl_realizado − posição_aberta.
panels.title: 💵 Disponível (Live)

panels.description: Saldo disponível na conta trade convertido para BRL a partir do último snapshot sincronizado da exchange.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_sync AS (
  SELECT MAX(synced_at) AS synced_at
  FROM btc.exchange_balance_snapshots
  WHERE account_type = 'trade'
), latest_balances AS (
  SELECT currency, available, price_usdt
  FROM btc.exchange_balance_snapshots ebs
  JOIN latest_sync ls ON ebs.synced_at = ls.synced_at
  WHERE ebs.account_type = 'trade' AND ebs.available > 0
), brl_rate AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    MAX(CASE WHEN currency = 'BRL' THEN NULLIF(price_usdt, 0) END),
    1
  ) AS brl_price_usdt
  FROM latest_balances
)
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(
  CASE
    WHEN lb.currency = 'BRL' THEN lb.available
    WHEN br.brl_price_usdt IS NULL OR br.brl_price_usdt = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE (lb.available * COALESCE(lb.price_usdt, CASE WHEN lb.currency = 'USDT' THEN 1 END, 0)) / br.brl_price_usdt
  END
), 0)::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM latest_balances lb
CROSS JOIN brl_rate br

panels.title: 💸 Disponível para Saque (R$)

panels.description: Soma dos aportes fiat em BRL confirmados pela API da KuCoin (MAIN + Fiat Deposit).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0)::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM btc.exchange_account_ledgers
WHERE currency = 'BRL'
  AND account_type = 'MAIN'
  AND direction = 'in'
  AND biz_type = 'Fiat Deposit'

targets.rawSql: SELECT TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora", regime AS "Regime", CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS "Preço", COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata->>'save_guardrail_source_model', ''), model) AS "Modelo", plan_text AS "Análise" FROM btc.ai_plans WHERE symbol = '$coin' AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$' AND to_timestamp(timestamp) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora", regime AS "Regime", CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS "Preço", COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata->>'save_guardrail_source_model', ''), model) AS "Modelo", plan_text AS "Análise Completa" FROM btc.ai_plans WHERE symbol = '$coin' AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$' AND to_timestamp(timestamp) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

Preço

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(to_timestamp(timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS data_hora,
  regime AS regime,
  CONCAT('$', ROUND(price::numeric, 2)) AS preco,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata->>'save_guardrail_source_model', ''), model) AS modelo,
  plan_text AS analise
FROM btc.ai_plans
WHERE symbol = '$coin'
AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
AND to_timestamp(timestamp) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Sentimento médio das notícias para a moeda base selecionada. Global por moeda; ignora o filtro de profile. -1=Bearish, 0=Neutro, 1=Bullish

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(sentiment), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS value FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 🎯 Confianca Media das Noticias

panels.description: Percentual de notícias da moeda base selecionada classificadas como Bullish vs Bearish. Global por moeda; ignora o filtro de profile.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN sentiment > 0.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS "Bullish %", COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN sentiment < -0.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS "Bearish %" FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 📊 Bullish vs Bearish

panels.description: Total de notícias da moeda base selecionada no período. Global por moeda; ignora o filtro de profile.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 📰 Notícias Analisadas

panels.description: Evolução do sentimento das notícias para a moeda base selecionada. Global por moeda; ignora o filtro de profile.

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch from timestamp) / 900) * 900) AS "time", AVG(sentiment)::numeric(10,4) AS "Sentimento Médio" FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch from timestamp) / 900) * 900) AS "time", (ARRAY_AGG(sentiment ORDER BY timestamp DESC))[1]::numeric(10,4) AS "Última Notícia" FROM btc.news_sentiment WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1) AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📈 Sentimento ao Longo do Tempo

panels.description: Notícias mais recentes da moeda base selecionada com classificação de sentimento. Global por moeda; ignora o filtro de profile.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS "Data/Hora",
  source AS "Fonte",
  title AS "Título",
  CASE WHEN sentiment > 0.1 THEN 'BULLISH' WHEN sentiment < -0.1 THEN 'BEARISH' ELSE 'NEUTRAL' END AS "Sentimento",
  ROUND(sentiment::numeric, 2) AS "Score",
  ROUND(confidence::numeric, 2) AS "Confiança"
FROM btc.news_sentiment
WHERE coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1)
AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: ⚠️ Fetch Errors (Global)

panels.description: Reconstruído a partir dos trades filtrados e snapshot live de preço. Não substitui os saldos live do exchange.

options.content:
💰 Performance & ROI do Modelo Desde {{{primeiro_trade}}}
{{{roi_arrow}}} {{{roi_pct}}}% Reconstruido por trades
Capital Base Modelo
$ {{{initial_capital}}}
Base configurada para o profile
Equity Modelo
$ {{{equity_total}}}
Trades filtrados + marcacao a mercado
PnL Realizado
$ {{{pnl_total}}}
Soma dos trades filtrados
Win Rate
{{{win_rate}}}%
{{{wins}}}W / {{{losses}}}L
Posicao por Trades
{{{position_btc}}} BTC
$ {{{usdt_free}}} caixa do modelo
Preco Medio Entrada
{{{avg_entry_display}}}
{{{entry_context}}}
PnL no período
$ {{{pnl_periodo}}}
{{{trades_periodo}}} trades no período
Total Trades
{{{total_trades}}}
{{{buys}}} buys / {{{sells}}} sells
Este painel reconstrui resultados a partir da tabela de trades filtrada. Os cards marcados como Live usam o saldo e a posicao reportados pelo exchange/exporter em tempo real.
Progresso ROI {{{roi_pct}}}%
Melhor trade: $ {{{best_trade}}} Pior trade: $ {{{worst_trade}}} Dias operando: {{{dias_operando}}}

targets.rawSql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(initial_capital), 100) FROM btc.profile_config WHERE profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$') AS initial_capital,
    count(*) AS total_trades,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE side='buy') AS buys,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE side='sell') AS sells,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) AS wins,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0) AS losses,
    COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_total,
    COALESCE(MAX(pnl), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS best_trade,
    COALESCE(MIN(pnl), 0)::numeric(10,4) AS worst_trade,
    to_timestamp(MIN(timestamp))::date AS first_trade_date
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
),
open_position AS (
  SELECT GREATEST(COALESCE(
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN side='buy' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source','') != 'external_deposit' THEN size
      WHEN side='sell' THEN -size
      ELSE 0
    END), 0
  ), 0)::numeric(18,8) AS net_btc
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
),
price_now AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT btc_price::numeric
      FROM btc.exchange_snapshots
      ORDER BY timestamp DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ),
    (
      SELECT price::numeric
      FROM btc.trades
      WHERE symbol = '$coin'
      AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
      ORDER BY timestamp DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ),
    0
  )::numeric(10,2) AS btc_price
),
period_stats AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::numeric(12,4) AS pnl_periodo, count(*) AS trades_periodo
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
  AND to_timestamp(timestamp) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
),
entry AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (SUM(CASE WHEN side='buy' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source','') != 'external_deposit' THEN funds ELSE 0 END)
     - SUM(CASE WHEN side='sell' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(funds,0), size*price) ELSE 0 END))
    / NULLIF((SUM(CASE WHEN side='buy' AND COALESCE(metadata->>'source','') != 'external_deposit' THEN size ELSE 0 END)
              - SUM(CASE WHEN side='sell' THEN size ELSE 0 END)), 0), 0
  )::numeric(10,2) AS avg_entry_raw
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  AND profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    s.initial_capital,
    s.total_trades, s.buys, s.sells, s.wins, s.losses,
    s.pnl_total, s.best_trade, s.worst_trade,
    COALESCE(TO_CHAR(s.first_trade_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), '--') AS primeiro_trade,
    COALESCE((NOW()::date - s.first_trade_date), 0) AS dias_operando,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN s.wins + s.losses > 0 THEN 100.0 * s.wins / (s.wins + s.losses) ELSE 0 END, 1) AS win_rate,
    op.net_btc AS position_btc,
    ROUND((op.net_btc * px.btc_price)::numeric, 2) AS position_usdt,
    ROUND(px.btc_price::numeric, 2) AS btc_price,
    CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN e.avg_entry_raw ELSE NULL::numeric(10,2) END AS avg_entry,
    CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN CONCAT('$ ', COALESCE(e.avg_entry_raw::text, '--')) ELSE '--' END AS avg_entry_display,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 AND e.avg_entry_raw IS NOT NULL THEN ((px.btc_price - e.avg_entry_raw) / NULLIF(e.avg_entry_raw, 0) * 100)::numeric ELSE 0 END, 2) AS entry_diff,
    CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 AND e.avg_entry_raw IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('Preco live: $ ', ROUND(px.btc_price::numeric, 2)::text, ' (', ROUND(((px.btc_price - e.avg_entry_raw) / NULLIF(e.avg_entry_raw, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2)::text, '%)') ELSE CONCAT('Sem posicao aberta • Preco live: $ ', ROUND(px.btc_price::numeric, 2)::text) END AS entry_context,
    ROUND((s.initial_capital + s.pnl_total + (op.net_btc * (px.btc_price - COALESCE(CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN e.avg_entry_raw END, px.btc_price))))::numeric, 2) AS equity_total,
    ROUND((s.initial_capital + s.pnl_total - (op.net_btc * COALESCE(CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN e.avg_entry_raw END, px.btc_price)))::numeric, 2) AS usdt_free,
    ROUND((((s.initial_capital + s.pnl_total + (op.net_btc * (px.btc_price - COALESCE(CASE WHEN op.net_btc > 0 THEN e.avg_entry_raw END, px.btc_price)))) - s.initial_capital) / NULLIF(s.initial_capital, 0) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS roi_pct,
    period_stats.pnl_periodo, period_stats.trades_periodo,
    10 AS n_entries
  FROM stats s
  CROSS JOIN open_position op
  CROSS JOIN price_now px
  CROSS JOIN period_stats
  CROSS JOIN entry e
)
SELECT
  c.*,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS roi_color,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0 THEN '▲' ELSE '▼' END AS roi_arrow,
  CASE WHEN c.pnl_total >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS pnl_color,
  CASE WHEN c.pnl_periodo >= 0 THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS pnl_periodo_color,
  CASE WHEN c.avg_entry IS NULL OR c.btc_price >= c.avg_entry THEN '#73BF69' ELSE '#F2495C' END AS entry_color,
  CASE WHEN c.roi_pct >= 0
    THEN 'linear-gradient(90deg, #73BF69, #56A64B)'
    ELSE 'linear-gradient(90deg, #F2495C, #CC3A4A)'
  END AS roi_gradient,
  LEAST(GREATEST(ABS(c.roi_pct), 1), 100) AS roi_bar_width
FROM calc c;

panels.title: 💰 Relatório de Performance & ROI (Modelo)

panels.description: Cada linha representa um trade como um bot independente. As colunas usam dados da propria linha; apenas Atual vem do mercado ao vivo para calcular falta, progresso e PnL.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_profile_sell AS (
  SELECT
    profile,
    MAX(timestamp) AS last_sell_ts
  FROM btc.trades
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
    AND dry_run = false
    AND side IN ('sell', 'sell_reconciled')
    AND profile IN ('aggressive', 'conservative', 'shadow')
  GROUP BY profile
),
open_buys_raw AS (
  SELECT
    t.*
  FROM btc.trades t
  LEFT JOIN latest_profile_sell lps ON lps.profile = t.profile
  WHERE t.symbol = '$coin'
    AND t.dry_run = false
    AND t.side = 'buy'
    AND COALESCE(t.metadata->>'source', '') != 'external_deposit'
    AND t.profile IN ('aggressive', 'conservative', 'shadow')
    AND (lps.last_sell_ts IS NULL OR t.timestamp > lps.last_sell_ts)
),
position_summary AS (
  SELECT
    profile,
    CONCAT(
      profile,
      '#',
      MIN(id),
      CASE WHEN MIN(id) <> MAX(id) THEN CONCAT('-', MAX(id)) ELSE '' END
    ) AS position_ref,
    COUNT(*) AS entries
  FROM open_buys_raw
  WHERE profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
  GROUP BY profile
),
open_trades AS (
  SELECT
    ob.id,
    ob.profile,
    ob.price,
    ob.size,
    ps.position_ref,
    ps.entries,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(ob.metadata->>'target_sell_trigger_price', '')::double precision,
      NULLIF(ob.metadata->>'target_sell_price', '')::double precision
    ) AS sell_target,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(ob.metadata->>'target_sell_reason', ''),
      NULLIF(ob.metadata->>'strategy_reason', ''),
      NULLIF(ob.metadata->>'reason', '')
    ) AS target_reason
  FROM open_buys_raw ob
  JOIN position_summary ps ON ps.profile = ob.profile
  WHERE ob.profile ~* '^(${profile:pipe})$'
),
latest_state AS (
  SELECT
    price AS current_price
  FROM btc.market_states
  WHERE symbol = '$coin'
  ORDER BY timestamp DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  ot.id AS "Trade",
  ot.profile AS "Perfil",
  CONCAT(ot.profile, ' #', ot.id::text) AS "Bot",
  CASE
    WHEN ot.entries > 1 AND ot.target_reason IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('multientrada ', ot.entries, 'x • ', ot.target_reason)
    WHEN ot.entries > 1 THEN CONCAT('multientrada ', ot.entries, 'x em ', ot.position_ref)
    WHEN ot.target_reason IS NOT NULL THEN ot.target_reason
    ELSE CONCAT('entrada unica em ', ot.position_ref)
  END AS "Cenário",
  ROUND(ot.size::numeric, 8) AS "BTC",
  ROUND(ot.price::numeric, 2) AS "Entrada",
  ROUND(ls.current_price::numeric, 2) AS "Atual",
  ROUND(ot.sell_target::numeric, 2) AS "Alvo",
  ROUND((ot.sell_target - ls.current_price)::numeric, 2) AS "Falta $",
  ROUND(((ot.sell_target / NULLIF(ls.current_price, 0) - 1) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS "Falta %",
  ROUND(
    LEAST(
      100,
      GREATEST(
        0,
        100 * (ls.current_price - ot.price) / NULLIF(ot.sell_target - ot.price, 0)
      )
    )::numeric,
    1
  ) AS "Progresso %",
  ROUND(((ls.current_price - ot.price) * ot.size)::numeric, 4) AS "PnL $",
  ROUND((((ls.current_price / NULLIF(ot.price, 0)) - 1) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS "PnL %",
  '🛒 Abrir menu' AS "Ação"
FROM open_trades ot
CROSS JOIN latest_state ls
ORDER BY ot.id DESC;

panels.title: 📍 Posições Pendentes e Indicadores

panels.description: Expõe a semântica de multiposição publicada pelo exporter para a posição aberta.
panels.title: 🧮 Estrutura Multiposição
📈 Evolução Patrimonial
panels.description: Evolução patrimonial live da conta (equity = USDT + BTC marcado a mercado). Fonte: btc.exchange_snapshots; visão global da conta, não segmentada por profile.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  to_timestamp(timestamp) AS time,
  equity_usdt AS "Patrimônio Total",
  usdt_balance AS "USDT Disponível",
  btc_balance * btc_price AS "BTC (em USDT)"
FROM btc.exchange_snapshots
WHERE to_timestamp(timestamp) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 🎯 Ranking de Acerto por Fonte (Sentimento vs Preço 4h)
panels.description: Percentual de acerto do sentimento previsto pela IA por fonte de notícia. Método: se BULLISH e BTC subiu em 4h → acerto; se BEARISH e BTC caiu em 4h → acerto. Acerto < 50% indica sinal contrário (inverter previsão).

targets.rawSql:
WITH article_with_prices AS (
    SELECT
        ns.source,
        ns.sentiment,
        (SELECT m.price FROM btc.market_states m
         WHERE m.symbol = 'BTC-USDT'
           AND m.timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(epoch FROM ns.timestamp) - 300
                               AND EXTRACT(epoch FROM ns.timestamp) + 300
         ORDER BY ABS(m.timestamp - EXTRACT(epoch FROM ns.timestamp))
         LIMIT 1) AS price_at,
        (SELECT m.price FROM btc.market_states m
         WHERE m.symbol = 'BTC-USDT'
           AND m.timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(epoch FROM ns.timestamp) + 13950
                               AND EXTRACT(epoch FROM ns.timestamp) + 14850
         ORDER BY ABS(m.timestamp - (EXTRACT(epoch FROM ns.timestamp) + 14400))
         LIMIT 1) AS price_4h
    FROM btc.news_sentiment ns
    WHERE ns.coin = SPLIT_PART('$coin', '-', 1)
      AND ns.sentiment != 0
      AND NOT (ns.sentiment = 0 AND ns.confidence = 0.25)
      AND ns.timestamp < NOW() - INTERVAL '4 hours'
),
acertos AS (
    SELECT
        source,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE price_at IS NOT NULL AND price_4h IS NOT NULL) AS previsoes,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE price_at IS NOT NULL AND price_4h IS NOT NULL
            AND ((sentiment > 0.1 AND price_4h > price_at)
              OR (sentiment < -0.1 AND price_4h < price_at))) AS acertos
    FROM article_with_prices
    GROUP BY source
)
SELECT
    INITCAP(source)           AS "Fonte",
    previsoes                 AS "Previsões",
    acertos                   AS "Acertos",
    ROUND(100.0 * acertos / NULLIF(previsoes, 0), 1) AS "% Acerto",
    CASE
        WHEN previsoes < 5 THEN '⏳ Amostra curta'
        WHEN ROUND(100.0 * acertos / NULLIF(previsoes, 0), 1) >= 50 THEN '✅ Positivo'
        WHEN ROUND(100.0 * acertos / NULLIF(previsoes, 0), 1) >= 40 THEN '⚠️ Fraco'
        ELSE '🔄 Contrário'
    END                       AS "Sinal"
FROM acertos
WHERE previsoes >= 1
ORDER BY ROUND(100.0 * acertos / NULLIF(previsoes, 0), 1) DESC, previsoes DESC

panels.title: 🎯 Sinal Leading Composto (derivativos + on-chain)
panels.description: Composição de Long/Short Ratio, Taker Buy/Sell, Funding Rate, Fear&Greed e Mempool. Atualiza a cada 60s. LEADING: chega antes do movimento de preço.

panels.title: 📊 Sinais Leading — Histórico (60s)
panels.description: Evolução dos sinais de derivativos e on-chain. Long/Short alto = risco de liquidação. Taker>1 = compradores. Funding positivo = over-bullish.
Variação do patrimônio total (equity) por dia calendário — equivalente ao PnL diário que a KuCoin exibe. Inclui posição aberta (não só trades fechados).

options.defaultContent: Sem dados em btc.exchange_snapshots para os últimos 90 dias.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
    SELECT
        (to_timestamp(timestamp)::date)::text AS day,
        timestamp,
        equity_usdt,
        FIRST_VALUE(equity_usdt) OVER w AS day_open,
        LAST_VALUE(equity_usdt)  OVER w AS day_close
    FROM btc.exchange_snapshots
    WHERE timestamp >= EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_DATE - 90))
    WINDOW w AS (
        PARTITION BY to_timestamp(timestamp)::date
        ORDER BY timestamp
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
    )
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    day,
    ROUND(((day_close - day_open) / NULLIF(day_open, 0) * 100)::numeric, 3) AS pnl_pct,
    ROUND((day_close - day_open)::numeric, 2)                               AS pnl_usdt
FROM daily
ORDER BY day ASC

panels.title: 📅 Calendário de PnL Diário
